description_long: This is a compact quadcopter drone with a streamlined, aerodynamic body finished in light gray. It features four extended arms, each supporting a black propeller with yellow-tipped blades, arranged symmetrically around the central chassis. The front of the drone houses a visible camera module, likely for aerial photography or video capture, encased in a protective mount. The landing gear consists of four fixed legs, providing stability during takeoff and landing. The body appears to be constructed primarily from lightweight plastic composites, with some metallic and electronic components likely inside. This drone is designed for agile flight and is suitable for use in urban environments for tasks such as surveillance, mapping, or recreational flying.
description: A sleek, light gray quadcopter drone with four black propellers, yellow tips, and a front-facing camera. It has fixed landing legs and a compact, aerodynamic body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the camera module and symmetrical propeller arrangement.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the fixed landing legs and side profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the chassis and the full spread of the propellers.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view from the opposite side, showing the landing legs and arm structure.
